rationale: In the citing paper, Van Heerde et al. (2008) appears only once in a grouped methodological citation supporting the use of a Tobit Type II model (alongside Danaher and Dagger 2013). The paper does not discuss this source's price-war context, findings, or specific mechanisms, and it is not used in hypothesis development or interpretation of results. Because the citation functions as a brief precedent/example rather than a distinct building block, this is a passing mention.
